---
id: handle-get-org-tags
title: "List org tags"
description: "Returns all tags used within the authenticated organization, each with a usage count reflecting the number of active links carrying that tag"

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/tags"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all tags used within the authenticated organization, each with a usage count reflecting the number of active links carrying that tag

  parameters={undefined}
